backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries linking UI changes to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides short descriptions of all major frontend files and their roles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles and OKLCH color tokens for light and dark mode themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React app and metadata.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component rendering header, hero, actions, and the Company Snapshot form.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: Buttons for example data, reset, and copying shareable links.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Form for all Company Snapshot fields with validation error display.
frontend/src/features/dcf/dcf.ts: Empty file reserved for DCF calculations.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines DcfInputs interface and provides default and example snapshot values.
frontend/src/features/dcf/sensitivity.ts: Empty file intended for sensitivity calculations.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Validates snapshot inputs and maps field errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and stored identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Manages DCF input state synced with URL query parameters and generates shareable links.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/csv.ts: Empty placeholder file for CSV utilities.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Utility functions for formatting currency, large numbers, percentages, and general numeric values.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Helpers for parsing numeric and percentage inputs and converting decimals to percentage strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point setting up React, query client, and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, typography, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Contains project metadata, feature definitions, and build planning state.
